2604.24697.title: Can Current Agents Close the Discovery-to-Application Gap? A Case Study in Minecraft
2604.24697.paper_summary: Discovering causal regularities and applying them to build functional systems--the discovery-to-application loop--is a hallmark of general intelligence, yet evaluating this capacity has been hindered by the vast complexity gap between scientific discovery and real-world engineering. We introduce SciCrafter, a Minecraft-based benchmark that operationalizes this loop through parameterized redstone circuit tasks. Agents must ignite lamps in specified patterns (e.g., simultaneously or in timed sequences); scaling target parameters substantially increases construction complexity and required knowledge, forcing genuine discovery rather than reliance on memorized solutions. Evaluating frontier models including GPT-5.2, Gemini-3-Pro, and Claude-Opus-4.5 under a general-purpose code agent scaffold, we find that all plateau at approximately 26% success rate. To diagnose these failures, we decompose the loop into four capacities--knowledge gap identification, experimental discovery, knowledge consolidation, and knowledge application--and design targeted interventions whose marginal contributions serve as proxies for corresponding gaps. Our analysis reveals that although the general knowledge application capability still remains as the biggest gap across all models, for frontier models the knowledge gap identification starts to become a major hurdle--indicating the bottleneck is shifting from solving problems right to raising the right problems for current AI. We release SciCrafter as a diagnostic probe for future research on AI systems that navigate the full discovery-to-application loop.
2604.24697.paper_summary_zh: 發現因果規律並將其應用於構建功能系統——發現到應用的循環——是一般智能的標誌，然而評估這一能力卻受到科學發現與現實世界工程之間龐大複雜性差距的阻礙。我們介紹了 SciCrafter，一個基於 Minecraft 的基準，通過參數化的紅石電路任務來操作這一循環。代理必須以指定的模式點亮燈（例如，同時或按時間序列）；目標參數的擴展顯著增加了建設的複雜性和所需知識，迫使真正的發現，而非依賴記憶的解決方案。在一般用途的代碼代理框架下評估包括 GPT-5.2、Gemini-3-Pro 和 Claude-Opus-4.5 的前沿模型，我們發現所有模型的成功率都在約 26% 附近達到平臺。為了診斷這些失敗，我們將循環分解為四個能力——知識差距識別、實驗發現、知識整合和知識應用——並設計針對性的干預措施，其邊際貢獻作為相應差距的代理。我們的分析顯示，儘管一般知識應用能力仍然是所有模型中最大的差距，但對於前沿模型來說，知識差距識別開始成為一個主要障礙——這表明瓶頸正從正確解決問題轉向為當前 AI 提出正確問題。我們發布 SciCrafter 作為未來研究 AI 系統的診斷探針，這些系統能夠導航完整的發現到應用循環。
2604.24697.author: Zhou Ziheng et.al.
2604.24697.authors: Zhou Ziheng, Huacong Tang, Jinyuan Zhang, Haowei Lin, Bangcheng Yang, Qian Long, Fang Sun, Yizhou Sun, Yitao Liang, Ying Nian Wu, Demetri Terzopoulos, Xiaofeng Gao
